# Copilot instructions

The binding rules for this repository live in **`AGENTS.md`** at the repo root (it points to `THINKING.md`, `PLAYBOOK.md`, and `STATE.md` where present). Read them in full before writing or editing any code — they are binding, not advisory.

Rules that always apply, even if you read nothing else: never commit or push unless the owner explicitly asks; never `git add -A` or `git checkout .`; never read, print, or commit secret files (`.env*`, tokens, cookies); done = demonstrated with pasted command output, never "it should work".
